masked_case_json.world_change: a distributed power supplier announced a very large strategic procurement expansion with a hyperscale cloud customer for on-site power systems, while also reporting rapid revenue growth and raising full-year expectations. the primary-source pattern showed that ai data-center construction was creating demand for power availability, not only for compute hardware.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Bloom Energy / Oracle. Primary sources: Bloom/Oracle strategic partnership release and Bloom Q1 2026 earnings release. Outcome check: contracted hyperscale demand and raised revenue expectations confirmed the mechanism from AI data-center growth to on-site power supplier cash flows. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
